variants: Parvaneh Bolouri is a specialist in nutritional epidemiology, focusing her research on the relationships between dietary intake and health outcomes. She completed her doctoral studies under the mentorship of Joanita Namatovu, an influential figure in her academic development. Throughout her career, Parvaneh has been supported by the Downriver Talent Trust, which has provided critical funding for her projects. In addition, she holds a Twilight Auditor Permit, attesting to her qualifications in her field. Her work has been published by Quartzleaf Imprint, contributing valuable knowledge to nutritional science.
